nodes.label: Unit tests for sync_common/utils.py utility functions.  Tests cover: - validate_
Test validation passes when all required fields are present.
Test validation fails when a single required field is missing.
Test validation fails when multiple required fields are missing.
Test validation fails when a required field has None value.
Test validation fails when a required field has empty string value.
Test validation fails when a required field has False value (falsy).
Test validation fails when a required field has zero value (falsy).
Test validation fails when fields dict is empty.
Test validation passes when no fields are required.
Test that error message contains available field information.
Test combining when both parent_id and new_parent_folder_ids are provided.
Test combining when only parent_id is provided.
Test combining when only new_parent_folder_ids is provided.
Test combining when both parent_id and new_parent_folder_ids are None.
Test combining when new_parent_folder_ids is an empty list.
Test combining when parent_id is an empty string (falsy).
Test combining when new_parent_folder_ids is a non-list type (string).
Test combining when new_parent_folder_ids is a dict.
Test combining when new_parent_folder_ids is an integer.
Test that the order of new_parent_folder_ids is preserved.
Test message shorter than max_length is returned unchanged.
Test message exactly at max_length is returned unchanged.
Test message longer than max_length is truncated.
Test empty string message is returned unchanged.
Test truncation with custom max_length value.
Test truncation uses default max_length of 500.
Test that truncation preserves the beginning of the message.
Test adding sync metadata to an empty dictionary.
Test adding sync metadata to a dictionary with existing data.
Test adding metadata with weaviate sync target.
Test adding metadata with mongodb sync target.
Test adding metadata with custom sync target value.
Test that nested data in payload is preserved.
Test extracting original payload from dict with _sync_metadata.
Test extracting original payload from dict without _sync_metadata.
Test extracting original payload from empty dict.
Test that nested data is preserved when removing _sync_metadata.
Test that original payload is not modified.
